# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Lambda functions with least-privilege access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment name for resource scoping

  S3BucketArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket that Lambda functions need access to
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:s3:::[a-zA-Z0-9.\-]+$'

  DynamoDBTableArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table that Lambda functions need access to
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:dynamodb:[a-z0-9\-]+:[0-9]{12}:table\/[a-zA-Z0-9._\-]+$'

  SQSQueueArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue that Lambda functions need access to
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:sqs:[a-z0-9\-]+:[0-9]{12}:[a-zA-Z0-9._\-]+$'

  SNSTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic that Lambda functions need access to
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:sns:[a-z0-9\-]+:[0-9]{12}:[a-zA-Z0-9._\-]+$'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'lambda-execution-role-${Environment}'
      Description: !Sub 'Least-privilege IAM role for Lambda functions in ${Environment}'
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/*:*'

        - PolicyName: CloudWatchMetricsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    cloudwatch:namespace: !Sub 'Custom/${Environment}/Lambda'

        - PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource:
                  - !Ref S3BucketArn
                  - !Sub '${S3BucketArn}/*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - s3:DeleteBucket
                  - s3:PutBucketPolicy
                  - s3:PutBucketAcl
                  - s3:PutEncryptionConfiguration
                  - s3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock
                Resource: '*'

        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                  - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
                  - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
                  - dynamodb:ConditionCheckItem
                Resource:
                  - !Ref DynamoDBTableArn
                  - !Sub '${DynamoDBTableArn}/index/*'

        - PolicyName: SQSAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                  - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
                Resource:
                  - !Ref SQSQueueArn

        - PolicyName: SNSAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Publish
                Resource:
                  - !Ref SNSTopicArn

      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaExecution

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution IAM role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-LambdaExecutionRoleArn'

  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda execution IAM role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${Environment}-LambdaExecutionRoleName'
